problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: The key to Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? is Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces — specifically Casimir effect between — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
